compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for .tickets/ v2 path guard removals in hook passthroughs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

TDD RED phase — write failing tests BEFORE v2 path exemptions are removed from hook passthroughs. These tests verify the guards are updated to use v3 paths.

## What to implement

Add tests to verify current v2 exemptions are removed:

1. test_cascade_breaker_no_tickets_v2_passthrough (tests/hooks/test-cascade-breaker.sh): inject a .tickets/ path as FILE_PATH in hook input with cascade counter >= 5. Assert hook BLOCKS (exit 2). Currently exits 0 due to case passthrough on .tickets/.

2. test_review_stop_check_no_tickets_v2_exclusion (tests/hooks/test-review-stop-check.sh or similar): set up a changed file under .tickets/ path, run hook. Assert the file appears in TOTAL_CHANGED. Currently grep -v exclusion hides it.

3. test_title_length_validator_v3_path_guarded (tests/hooks/test-title-length-validator.sh): pass a file path under the v3 event-sourced path with a title exceeding 255 chars. Assert BLOCKED (exit 2). Currently exits 0 because guard pattern only matches v2 path.

## TDD Requirement
Tests must FAIL (RED) before tasks 5959-b4c7 and 4d0b-13e1 apply changes.
Tests must PASS (GREEN) after those tasks.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] New test function test_cascade_breaker_no_tickets_v2_passthrough exists in tests/hooks/test-cascade-breaker.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_cascade_breaker_no_tickets_v2_passthrough' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-cascade-breaker.sh

- [ ] New test functions exist for review-stop-check and title-length-validator covering v2 path removal
  Verify: grep -rq 'test_review_stop_check_no_tickets_v2\|test_title_length_validator_v3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/

- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED) with current codebase before tasks 5959-b4c7, 4d0b-13e1 apply changes
  Verify: manually confirm tests fail before implementation

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: task complete, committed in batch 8
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
